name: part_008
file: tmp_【重大告知あり】新３Dお披露目？！癒月ちょこ生誕祭2026🎂 【ホロライブ⧸癒月ちょこ】 [_1PGuuEP7ps]_gemini-3-flash-preview/part_008.webm

scenes.description: Yuzuki Choco and Natsuiro Matsuri performing 'Chocolate Box'.
A transition sequence showing a ticking clock and Choco revealing her new 3D outfit.
Yuzuki Choco and Kazama Iroha performing 'Kohaku Biyori, desu!'.

subtitles.original: 二人だけのデコレーションを
subtitles.english: Decoration just for the two of us

subtitles.original: ちりばめて彩って
subtitles.english: scattered and colored

subtitles.original: 食べちゃおうか
subtitles.english: Shall we eat it?

subtitles.original: 苦い苦い愛の玉手箱
subtitles.english: A bitter, bitter treasure box of love

subtitles.original: 未来味の不思議なチョコレート
subtitles.english: Mysterious chocolate with the taste of the future

subtitles.original: 温めて混ぜたらきっと
subtitles.english: If you warm it and mix it, surely

subtitles.original: いつかお口に合う味になるの
subtitles.english: it'll eventually become a taste that suits your mouth

subtitles.original: ねぇねぇ、チョコいいかな
subtitles.english: Hey, hey, can I talk to you, Choco?

subtitles.original: なんで？
subtitles.english: Why?

subtitles.original: さっきは、あのね、ごめんね
subtitles.english: About earlier, um, I'm sorry

subtitles.original: 何が？
subtitles.english: For what?

subtitles.original: いつも、モヤってなるじゃん
subtitles.english: I always get all hazy, right?

subtitles.original: それで？
subtitles.english: And?

subtitles.original: 今日は、これを渡したくて
subtitles.english: Today, I wanted to give you this

subtitles.original: 言葉じゃ足りないからさ
subtitles.english: Words aren't enough, you see

subtitles.original: だから？
subtitles.english: So?

subtitles.original: 受け取ってくれないかな？
subtitles.english: Would you please accept it?

subtitles.original: 何よ？
subtitles.english: What is it?

subtitles.original: 一緒にいてくれてありがとう
subtitles.english: Thank you for being with me

subtitles.original: わぁぁ！
subtitles.english: Waaa!

subtitles.original: なんだよ、それ！
subtitles.english: What's with that?!

subtitles.original: あなたの優しさに ついつい甘えちゃう
subtitles.english: I end up depending on your kindness

subtitles.original: 誰よりも近いから 素直になれない
subtitles.english: Because we're closer than anyone, I can't be honest

subtitles.original: 君の一生懸命さ ついつい忘れちゃう
subtitles.english: I end up forgetting how hard you try

subtitles.original: 誰よりも一番 大好きなのに
subtitles.english: Even though I love you more than anyone else

subtitles.original: 甘い甘い夢の宝箱
subtitles.english: A sweet, sweet treasure box of dreams

subtitles.original: 奇跡味の代償のチョコレート
subtitles.english: Chocolate as the price of a miracle flavor

subtitles.original: 二人だけのイノベーションを
subtitles.english: Innovation just for the two of us

subtitles.original: 探し組み立てたら賑やか
subtitles.english: If we find it and build it, it'll be lively

subtitles.original: 苦い苦い日々の化粧箱
subtitles.english: A bitter, bitter makeup box of daily life

subtitles.original: 世界味の代償のチョコレート
subtitles.english: Chocolate as the price of a world flavor

subtitles.original: 冷め切って割れないように
subtitles.english: So it doesn't cool down and break

subtitles.original: 大事に包んで生涯の完成まで
subtitles.english: Wrapping it carefully until the completion of a lifetime

subtitles.original: いつだって
subtitles.english: Always

subtitles.original: 病める時も
subtitles.english: Even when sick

subtitles.original: どんな時も
subtitles.english: No matter when

subtitles.original: そうずっと
subtitles.english: Yes, forever

subtitles.original: 健やかな時も
subtitles.english: Even when healthy

subtitles.original: 手を取って 違う二人を分かつまで
subtitles.english: Taking hands, until the different two are parted

subtitles.original: 愛してる
subtitles.english: I love you

subtitles.original: 僕もそうさ
subtitles.english: So do I

subtitles.original: そばにいて
subtitles.english: Stay by my side

subtitles.original: そばにいる
subtitles.english: I'll stay by your side

subtitles.original: なんて嘘かもよ
subtitles.english: That might be a lie

subtitles.original: ああそうかい 僕も適当に言った
subtitles.english: Ah, I see. I just said it randomly too

subtitles.original: 甘い甘い
subtitles.english: Sweet, sweet

subtitles.original: 苦い苦い
subtitles.english: Bitter, bitter

subtitles.original: 甘い甘い恋の魔法箱
subtitles.english: A sweet, sweet magic box of love

subtitles.original: 宇宙味の秘密のチョコレート
subtitles.english: Secret chocolate with the taste of the universe

subtitles.original: 二人だけのデコレーションを
subtitles.english: Decoration just for the two of us

subtitles.original: ちりばめて彩って食べちゃおうか
subtitles.english: scattered and colored, shall we eat it?

subtitles.original: 苦い苦い愛の玉手箱
subtitles.english: A bitter, bitter treasure box of love

subtitles.original: 未来味の不思議なチョコレート
subtitles.english: Mysterious chocolate with the taste of the future

subtitles.original: 温めて混ぜたら絶対
subtitles.english: If you warm it and mix it, absolutely

subtitles.original: いつか最高に幸せな味になるの
subtitles.english: it'll eventually become a taste of supreme happiness

subtitles.original: Thank you so much! See you next time!
subtitles.english: Thank you so much! See you next time!

subtitles.original: ねぇ、ひとつだけ
subtitles.english: Hey, just one thing...

subtitles.original: 聞いてもいい？
subtitles.english: Can I ask you?

subtitles.original: 私のことを
subtitles.english: About me...

subtitles.original: 告白日和、です！
subtitles.english: Confession Day, it is!

subtitles.original: 会えるかな今日は 心が騒いで
subtitles.english: Will I meet you today? My heart is restless

subtitles.original: ズキズキしたくなる 時めき踊る瞬間
subtitles.english: It starts to ache, the moment my heart dances

subtitles.original: 私のことなど 多分気にしてないの
subtitles.english: You probably don't even care about me

subtitles.original: だけどここにいるんだよ 私はここよ
subtitles.english: But I'm right here, I'm right here

subtitles.original: 地面が揺れ動く 嫌われてないかな
subtitles.english: The ground is shaking, I wonder if you hate me

subtitles.original: 勢いでとにかく 挨拶だ
subtitles.english: With momentum, I'll just say hello

subtitles.original: やっと晴れたね
subtitles.english: It finally cleared up

subtitles.original: ぱっと晴れたね
subtitles.english: It suddenly cleared up

subtitles.original: そして元気になれ
subtitles.english: And then, cheer up!

subtitles.original: 「おはよう」の代わりに
subtitles.english: Instead of "Good morning"

subtitles.original: 背中をたたいて さあ行くよ
subtitles.english: I'll pat your back, here we go!

subtitles.original: やっと晴れたら
subtitles.english: Once it finally clears up

subtitles.original: ぱっと晴れたら
subtitles.english: Once it suddenly clears up

subtitles.original: きっと元気な笑顔
subtitles.english: Surely, a cheerful smile

subtitles.original: なんだか今のこの 気持ちが切なくなったよ
subtitles.english: Somehow, this current feeling has become painful

subtitles.original: 授業は上の空 遠くを眺めたい
subtitles.english: Daydreaming during class, I want to look far away

subtitles.original: 恋って甘いもんじゃない 違うかもださ半分
subtitles.english: Love isn't a sweet thing, or maybe it is, half and half
